calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-11-2017 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-27-2017 Granted Per Written Order

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (329-331 Franconia Street, San Francisco Ca 94110)
Off Calendar Aug-02-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Janet Boessenecker for the San Francisco Public Administrator.

The sale was confirmed at $1,430,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed 7/1/16 and subject to the existing tenant rights and close of escrow within 15 days. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond is not required.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-11-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Janet M. Boessenecker for San Francisco Public Administrator.

Ms. Bossenecker stated that there are no objections to this petition and that she has no further argument to add.

The Court having reviewed the submitted pleadings granted that Petition for probate of will and letters testamentary (subject to review of order).

Judge Paul Alvarado, Clerk: N. Wong, Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)

EX PARTE PETITION FOR LETTERS OF SPECIAL ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-21-2016 Granted Per Written Order
